title: polycantha crispus
intro: Polycantha crispus, also known as Chinese sea holly, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polycantha crispus include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and aiding in the treatment of fever and cough. Polycantha crispus is often prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures for its herbal benefits, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
